blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,184 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 56.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 27" over the past week. Current depth: 88".
